text.title: django-quality-logging Procedure
text.summary: Six-step procedure to audit and remediate a Django project's logging + observability stack. Each step has explicit input, action, output, and a decision gate.

step.name: audit-current-state
step.input: repository root path, settings module path (`config.settings.production`)
step.action: grep `MIDDLEWARE`, `LOGGING`, `import logging`, `import structlog`, `sentry_sdk.init` across the repo. Capture installed packages (`pip list | grep -Ei "structlog|sentry-sdk"`).
step.output: baseline report: structlog y/n, django-structlog y/n, sentry y/n, mixed-logger modules list.
step.decision-gate: If structlog + django-structlog + sentry-sdk already present AND middleware registered AND Sentry has DSN — skip to step 5 (verify) rather than reinstalling.

step.name: install-deps
step.action: Add `structlog>=24`, `django-structlog>=10`, `sentry-sdk>=2`. Run `uv sync` (or equivalent). Pin transitive versions in lockfile.
step.decision-gate: Lockfile diff reviewed by a human before commit.

step.name: wire-structlog
step.action: Copy `templates/logging.py` snippet into base.py — configure structlog processor chain and LOGGING dict; insert `django_structlog.middlewares.RequestMiddleware` into MIDDLEWARE after AuthenticationMiddleware.
step.decision-gate: Run `python -c "import django; django.setup(); import structlog; structlog.get_logger().info('test', request_id='x')"` and confirm JSON output.

step.name: wire-sentry
step.action: Copy `templates/sentry_init.py` into production.py. Implement `scrub_sensitive_data` mutating event["request"]["data"] / event["request"]["headers"]. Register custom system check warning when SENTRY_DSN unset.
step.output: Sentry init block + scrubber + system check
step.decision-gate: Trigger a deliberate test exception in staging; verify event appears in Sentry with PII keys scrubbed.

step.name: run-check-deploy
step.output: verdict: pass | warning | error + warning list
step.decision-gate: Block merge if any WARNING or ERROR remains.

step.name: emit-report
step.action: Render `templates/audit-report.md` with the JSON Schema frontmatter from `02-output-contract.xml`. Run `scripts/validate-django-quality-logging.py` against the report.
